name: inky-dash-admin
description: Admin UI bundle for Inky Dash. Vanilla JS Lit components bundled with esbuild.

scripts.build: npm run gen-types && esbuild static/pages/components-demo.js static/pages/editor.js static/pages/themes.js static/pages/schedules.js static/pages/send.js static/pages/settings.js --bundle --format=esm --outdir=static/dist --target=es2022 --minify --legal-comments=none
scripts.dev: npm run gen-types && esbuild static/pages/components-demo.js static/pages/editor.js static/pages/themes.js static/pages/schedules.js static/pages/send.js static/pages/settings.js --bundle --format=esm --outdir=static/dist --target=es2022 --watch --sourcemap
